description: Royalty-free ambient loops bundled for AutoScale video assembly (Mixkit-style metadata).
notes: AutoScale loops BGM with ffmpeg -stream_loop -1 during assembly.
Mood routing: objection→calm, comparison→energetic, pain_led/ai_broll/demo→tech (see audio-mix.ts + production-options.ts).
Replace files in public/audio/bgm/ with your own licensed tracks; keep BGM_TRACKS in sync.
Only embed audio you have rights to use in rendered MP4 exports.
